compiled_state.title: RED: Add test assertions for onboarding infrastructure initialization
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description
Add new test assertions to tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh that will fail (RED) against the current SKILL.md. These assertions validate that the onboarding skill includes infrastructure initialization steps.

## File Impact
- MODIFY: tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh

## New Test Assertions to Add
1. test_hook_installation_instructions: SKILL.md must instruct installing git pre-commit hooks (test gate, review gate) — grep for 'pre-commit-test-gate' or 'pre-commit-review-gate' or 'hook.*install'
2. test_hook_manager_detection: SKILL.md must mention detecting hook managers (Husky, pre-commit framework, bare .git/hooks) — grep for 'Husky' AND ('pre-commit' or '.git/hooks')
3. test_git_common_dir: SKILL.md must mention git rev-parse --git-common-dir for worktree/submodule support — grep for 'git-common-dir'
4. test_ticket_system_init: SKILL.md must instruct initializing ticket system (orphan branch, .tickets-tracker/) — grep for 'orphan' AND 'tickets-tracker'
5. test_ticket_smoke_test: SKILL.md must instruct performing a ticket smoke test after init — grep for 'smoke.*test' or 'create.*read.*ticket'
6. test_generate_test_index: SKILL.md must reference generate-test-index.sh — grep for 'generate-test-index'
7. test_claude_md_generation: SKILL.md must instruct generating CLAUDE.md with ticket command references — grep for 'CLAUDE.md' AND 'ticket.*command'
8. test_known_issues_template: SKILL.md must reference KNOWN-ISSUES template — grep for 'KNOWN-ISSUES'
9. test_ci_trigger_strategy: SKILL.md must ask about CI trigger strategy (not assume PR-based) — grep for 'trigger.*strategy' or 'CI.*trigger' or 'not.*assume.*PR'
10. test_push_verification: SKILL.md must verify push success after ticket system init — grep for 'push.*verif' or 'push.*fail' or 'push.*warn'

## TDD Requirement
All new tests must FAIL when run against current SKILL.md (RED state).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh 2>&1 | tail -3
- [ ] At least 8 new test functions added
  Verify: grep -c 'test_hook_installation\|test_hook_manager\|test_git_common_dir\|test_ticket_system_init\|test_ticket_smoke\|test_generate_test_index\|test_claude_md_generation\|test_known_issues\|test_ci_trigger\|test_push_verification' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 8)}'
- [ ] New assertions fail against current SKILL.md (RED confirmed)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh 2>&1 | grep -c FAIL | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: RED state confirmed — 9 new tests FAIL, 31 existing tests PASS ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — AC1: tests/run-all.sh exit 0 (55 passed), AC2: 10 new test functions added (>= 8), AC3: 9 FAIL lines (>= 5 confirmed)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
